report_name: Investigation Launched into P3 Global Intel Breach Exposing 8 Million+ Sensitive Law Enforcement Tips

attack_patterns.name: Data from Cloud Storage Object
attack_patterns.description: The attacker collected and exfiltrated over 8 million sensitive tip records, equivalent to 93 GB of data, from the P3 Global Intel cloud platform's storage.

attack_patterns.name: Automated Exfiltration
attack_patterns.description: The large scale of the breach, involving 93 GB of data and over 8 million records, indicates the use of automated methods to exfiltrate the entire dataset in bulk.

campaigns.name: P3 Global Intel Data Breach
campaigns.description: A data breach campaign in March 2026 targeting the P3 Global Intel cloud platform, resulting in the exfiltration of over 8 million sensitive law enforcement tip records.
campaigns.objective: Exfiltration of sensitive law enforcement tip data.

identities.name: P3 Global Intel
identities.description: A cloud-based tip management system, owned by Navigate360, that suffered a massive data breach exposing over 8 million sensitive law enforcement tips.

identities.name: Navigate360
identities.description: The parent company of P3 Global Intel, the platform compromised in the data breach.

identities.name: Anonymous Tipsters and Subjects
identities.description: Individuals who submitted anonymous tips or were subjects of tips, whose personal information was exposed in the P3 Global Intel data breach, placing them at risk of identity theft, fraud, and physical harm.

indicators.name: Potential SQL Injection Attempt Against Tip Management Platform
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential SQL Injection Attempt Against Tip Management Platform
id: 7c5b9f8a-1e2d-4b3c-8a9f-0d1e2f3a4b5c
status: experimental
description: Detects web requests containing common SQL injection patterns, potentially targeting a public-facing application like the P3 Global Intel platform.
references:
  - https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/19/2865432/0/en/Data-Breach-Alert-Edelson-Lechtzin-LLP-Investigates-Reported-P3-Global-Intel-Incident.html
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-19
tags:
  - attack.t1190
level: high
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  selection_sqli:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - 'union all select'
      - 'union select'
      - ' and 1=1'
      - ' or 1=1'
      - 'information_schema'
      - 'waitfor delay'
      - 'select * from'
  selection_host:
    c-host|contains: 'p3tips.com'
  condition: all of them
indicators.description: This indicator detects potential SQL Injection (SQLi) attempts against the p3tips.com domain, as described as a possible attack vector in the P3 Global Intel breach analysis.
